General.Name: Joy Spreader Interactive Tech Ltd
General.Description: Joy Spreader Group Inc., a marketing technology company, provides digital marketing and related services in Mainland China and Hong Kong. It operates through Provision of Performance Based We-Media Marketing Services; Sales of E-commerce Goods; and Others segments. The company offers performance-based we-media marketing services for various products, including e-commerce goods, mobile applications, mobile games, online literature, etc.; sells e-commerce goods; and offers culture related services. It is also involved in the trading business. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

4.Name: Mr. Zhidi  Zhang
4.Title: Head of Joy Spreader Interactive Group (HK) Limited
